steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states, “As he gained more customers, New began using sewing machines and other tools to help him produce bags more efficiently….” This directly links sewing machines to meeting increased demand.

steps.title: Match the logical consequence
steps.content: Choice B aligns with the signal, as not using sewing machines would hinder meeting customer demand. The other choices either reverse cause-effect relationships (A, C) or miss the production-demand context entirely (D). That matches choice B — B is correct.
